CustomField.description: The Schedule Type field indicates whether the reconciliation schedule is of type 'Actual' or 'TrueUp'. Default Value is automatically set to 'Actual' for new reconciliation schedules where a TrueUp has not occurred. When a TrueUp is initiated via the 'TrueUp' button, this field value on the Trueup Reconciliation record will have the value as 'TrueUp'
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The Schedule Type field indicates whether the reconciliation schedule is of type 'Actual' or 'TrueUp'. Default Value is automatically set to 'Actual' for new reconciliation schedules where a TrueUp has not occurred. When a TrueUp is initiated via the 'TrueUp' button, this field value on the Trueup Reconciliation record will have the value as 'TrueUp'
CustomField.label: Schedule Type
